title: Rename device - old FW no rename, new FW rename present
scenario: Verify that the "Device Name" setting is absent on old firmware and present after updating to new firmware on supported devices (Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40).
steps: 1. Check the current firmware version on the device.
2. Navigate to the device settings menu.
4. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting is NOT present on the old firmware.
5. Update the device to the new firmware.
6. After the update, navigate to the device settings menu again.
8. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting IS present on the new firmware.
expected: The "Device Name" setting should not be present on old firmware but should be present after updating to new firmware on supported devices (Free 60+/Osprey, Free 60/Tern, Free 20/Emu, Sync 20, Sync 20M, Sync 40).
